title: The Law of Peoples
author: John Rawls
content: “A society that ignores the rule of law will eventually find that its own power is its greatest liability.”
action: Record: Law is the framework that prevents internal power from cannibalizing the state.

title: Marbury v. Madison
author: US Supreme Court
content: “It is emphatically the province and duty of the judicial department to say what the law is.”
action: Record: Establish the final authority for interpreting the system's own rules.

title: The Nuremberg Diary
author: G.M. Gilbert
content: “The defense of 'following orders' is the abdication of individual moral agency, which is the prerequisite for mass atrocity.”
action: Record: The individual is the final firewall against systemic criminality.

title: Against the Law
author: Peter Benenson
content: “The law must be used as a weapon to protect the weak, or it will inevitably become the tool of the strong.”
action: Record: Use legal frameworks to create leverage against concentrated power.

title: Leviathan
author: Thomas Hobbes
content: “Covenants, without the sword, are but words and of no strength to secure a man at all.”
action: Record: Theoretical rules are irrelevant without the enforcement mechanism to back them.
